negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. name: av_95b33268-1642-4661-a01d-33410927f497
prompt: The video opens with a view from inside a vehicle stopped at a traffic light at an intersection under an overcast sky. The intersection is marked with clear road markings that include pedestrian crossings and traffic signals, with the traffic light initially showing red. Surrounding the intersection are trees and a few buildings, including one with a brown roof and beige walls. The hood of the ego vehicle is visible at the bottom of the frame, reflecting the cloudy sky. As the video progresses, the ego vehicle comes to a stop at the intersection, and then it turns right after the traffic light changes from red to green. The scene remains largely unchanged, with no significant movement or new objects appearing, maintaining the same composition and elements throughout the scene. By the final frame, the vehicle has started moving, indicated by the changing traffic light and the slight shift in perspective, suggesting the vehicle is now in motion across the intersection.
